sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الأُمُّ مَرِيضَةً وَبَقِيَتْ فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je bila bolesna i ostala je kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: The mother was sick and stayed at home.

sentences.arabic: طَبَخَ الأَبُ الطَّعَامَ وَنَظَّفَ الْمَطْبَخَ وَحِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Otac je sam skuhao hranu i počistio kuhinju.
sentences.translationEn: The father cooked the food and cleaned the kitchen alone.

sentences.arabic: سَاعَدَتِ الِابْنَةُ أَبَاهَا فِي تَرْتِيبِ الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Kćerka je pomogla ocu u sređivanju kuće.
sentences.translationEn: The daughter helped her father tidy up the house.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتِ الأُمُّ بِالسَّعَادَةِ لِأَنَّ أُسْرَتَهَا تُحِبُّهَا.
sentences.translation: Majka se osjećala sretno jer je njena porodica voli.
sentences.translationEn: The mother felt happy because her family loves her.
